stories.headline: North Korea Lazarus Linked to $292M Kelp Drain as April Losses Top $606M
stories.tldr: Forensics tie North Korea's Lazarus Group to the $292M KelpDAO drain, capping crypto's worst hack month since February 2025's Bybit breach.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: State-actor attribution will accelerate Treasury sanctions on bridges and oracles, turning compliance burden into a core DeFi risk parameter.
the_details: $292M Kelp drain traced to LayerZero verification stack; April hack tally now $606M across 18 days, per crypto.news.
Drift Protocol on Solana lost $285M to a social engineering attack the same week, doubling the contagion.
Bridge failures and admin-key exploits dominate April's attack vectors, replacing classic smart-contract bugs.

stories.headline: SEC and CFTC Sign Historic MOU, Issue Joint Crypto Asset Interpretation
stories.tldr: The SEC and CFTC formalized a memorandum of understanding and issued a joint interpretation clarifying which crypto assets fall under each agency's jurisdiction.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A unified federal stance ends a decade of jurisdictional whiplash and unlocks the rulemaking pipeline that ETF and stablecoin issuers have been waiting on.
the_details: Joint interpretation aligns CFTC enforcement of the Commodity Exchange Act with SEC's reading of federal securities laws.
April 13 SEC Trading and Markets statement carves out broker-dealer registration relief for compliant Covered User Interface Providers.
Move follows GENIUS Act stablecoin rulemaking and Atkins' one-year shift from enforcement-heavy to rulemaking-mode SEC.

stories.headline: Solana Greenlights Alpenglow Upgrade as Grayscale GSOL Staking ETF Goes Live
stories.tldr: Solana's Alpenglow consensus upgrade targets 100-150ms finality just as Grayscale's GSOL staking ETF begins trading on NYSE Arca.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Sub-second finality plus a yield-bearing ETF wrapper hands Solana a pitch no other L1 can match for institutional flow.
the_details: Alpenglow replaces Proof-of-History and Tower BFT with Votor finality (100-150ms) and Rotor data relay.
Grayscale Solana Staking ETF (GSOL) listed on NYSE Arca, expanding the staking-yield ETF category beyond Ethereum.
SOL trading at $86.43 (+0.16%) as ETF flows into BTC, SOL, XRP products counter $75.9M ETH outflow this week.

stories.headline: Bitcoin Tags $80K, Tracks Best Month in a Year as USDT Mints $5B in April
stories.tldr: Bitcoin briefly tagged $80,000 as Tether minted $5 billion in fresh USDT, putting BTC on track for its best month in a year.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Stablecoin issuance is the cleanest leading indicator of incoming spot demand — $5B in fresh USDT signals dry powder, not just chart-chasing.
the_details: BTC-dollar inverse correlation hit a near-4-year extreme, per CoinDesk's April 24 daybook.
Hyperliquid's largest perpetual traders built aggressively long positions through Feb-Apr as US-Iran talks resumed.
USDT supply added ~$5B in April; rebound coincides with ceasefire extensions cooling the geopolitical risk premium.

stories.headline: XRP Becomes First Major Crypto With Dual SEC-CFTC Commodity Status
stories.tldr: XRP secured full commodity classification from both the SEC and CFTC, with seven spot XRP ETFs now holding a combined $1 billion in AUM.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The dual designation removes the last regulatory overhang on a top-five asset and sets the template every other altcoin issuer will now chase.
the_details: Seven spot XRP ETFs now hold $1B combined; GraniteShares debuted 3x long and short daily XRP ETFs on Nasdaq.
SoFi enabled XRP deposits for retail customers, though external withdrawals remain restricted at launch.
XRP price coiled at $1.44 in a tight 'triangle squeeze' pattern, signaling a decisive break either direction.
